title: elymus × obtusiusculus
intro: Elymus × obtusiusculus, also known as the hybrid wheat grass, is a cross between the Elymus caninus and Elymus smithii species, resulting in a unique plant with distinct characteristics. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Elymus × obtusiusculus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
